title: Typed Tool Contracts, JSON Schema, Descriptions, Domains, and Versions · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds least-capability typed tool catalog from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of least-capability typed tool catalog while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pract…
objectives: Define one narrow tool purpose, effect class, caller, user benefit, authority, timeout, idempotency, and prohibited use.
Specify required properties, types, bounds, patterns, enums, nested limits, and additional-property policy with a supported schema subset.
Write tool and parameter descriptions that distinguish when to call, when not to call, required evidence, effects, and failure semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Tool Purpose Boundary
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 6481 during a multilingual case-routing evaluation. Build deterministic Python evidence to design narrow typed tool contracts with purpose, descriptions, domains, required fields, rejection, and version identity; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-tool-schema-version-18f7tu
# Competency: agentpy-tool-schema-version.
# Case 9240: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_tool_schema_version_18f7tu(tool_schemas: int = 8, valid_schemas: int = 8, ambiguous_parameters: int = 0, bounded_enums: int = 6, schema_versions: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_18f7tu = "18f7tu-ut7f81-9240"
    assert evidence_variant_18f7tu
    evidence_axes_18f7tu = (
        "authority18f7tu",
        "interaction9240",
        "toolut7f81",
        "state18f7tu9240",
        "evaluation924018f7tu",
        "recoveryut7f819240",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_18f7tu)) == 6
    if tool_schemas < 3 or valid_schemas < 0:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-count"
    if valid_schemas != tool_schemas:
        return False, valid_schemas, "tool-schema-invalid"
    if ambiguous_parameters > 0 or bounded_enums < 2:
        return False, ambiguous_parameters, "parameter-ambiguity"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "tool-schema-version"
    assert valid_schemas == tool_schemas and ambiguous_parameters == 0
    return True, valid_schemas, "typed-tool-catalog"
